category_sources: source_facts.description says it embeds resources like HTML, JS, CSS, images, and templates in Go; official GitHub README describes go.rice as a Go package for working with such resources and embedding them into executables.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses go.rice; source_facts.homepage is https://github.com/GeertJohan/go.rice.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes installation, package usage, embedding behavior, and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/GeertJohan/go.rice; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify Go resource/static asset embedding for HTML, JS, CSS, images, and templates.
